case_title: ANKUR GUPTA VS. LARRY WASHINGTON ET AL

docket_entries.description: DEFENDANTS OBJECTION TO NOTICE OF ARBITRATION AND STATEMENT OF INTENT TO APPEAR (TRANSACTION ID # 200023171) FILED BY DEFENDANT LYFT INC. HEARING SET FOR JAN-20-2021 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPT 610
